messages.content:
Me lo puoi tradurre in inglese?
Pedra Santa è un raffinato Resort immerso nel cuore della splendida Costa Smeralda in Sardegna, un posto magico a pochi minuti d’auto da Porto Cervo e dai migliori locali della zona. Sorge tra rocce granitiche e vanta una vista mozzafiato sulle acque cristalline di Baja Sardinia.

Pedra Santa is a refined resort nestled in the heart of the stunning Costa Smeralda in Sardinia, a magical place just a few minutes drive from Porto Cervo and the best local hotspots. It is located among granite rocks and boasts a breathtaking view of the crystal-clear waters of Baja Sardinia.

Pedra Santa is a refined resort nestled in the heart of the stunning Costa Smeralda in Sardinia, a magical place just a few minutes drive from Porto Cervo and the best local hotspots. It is located among granite rocks and boasts a breathtaking view of the crystal-clear waters of Baja Sardinia.
This sentence is already the English translation of the original Italian text.

La massima attenzione e professionalità dello staff è una garanzia. 
Il team del Resort Pedra Santa è professionale e dedito a fornire un servizio eccezionale. Puntiamo a cerare un’esperienza accogliente e memorabile per tutti i nostri clienti, assicurandoci che il soggiorno sia di gradimento e senza stress.

The utmost attention and professionalism of the staff is guaranteed. The team at Pedra Santa Resort is professional and dedicated to providing exceptional service. We aim to create a welcoming and memorable experience for all of our clients, ensuring that their stay is enjoyable and stress-free.
Un titolo per una sezione che ha il precedente testo?
"Professionalità e attenzione al servizio al Pedra Santa Resort"
in inglese
"Professionalism and Service Excellence at Pedra Santa Resort"

Pedra Santa offre al cliente ogni mezzo per esaudire il proprio soggiorno da sogno: 
centro fitness, centro benessere, terrazze panoramiche, piscina all’aperto e la meravigliosa spiaggia privata raggiungibile con un servizio navetta gratuito. Oltre al banco accoglienza aperto 24h per ogni esigenza dell’ospite. Se tu puoi sognarlo, noi possiamo realizzarlo.

Pedra Santa Resort offers every means to fulfill guests' dreams: a fitness center, a wellness center, panoramic terraces, an outdoor swimming pool, and a stunning private beach accessible via a free shuttle service. Additionally, there is a 24-hour reception desk to attend to guests' needs. If you can dream it, we can make it happen.
a title for the previous text?
"Ultimate Dream Getaways at Pedra Santa Resort"

Pedra Santa Resort offers every means to fulfill guests’ dreams: a fitness center, a wellness center, panoramic terraces, an outdoor swimming pool, and a stunning private beach accessible via a free shuttle service. Additionally, there is a 24-hour reception desk to attend to guests’ needs. If you can dream it, we can make it happen.
This sentence is already the English translation of the previous Italian text.

Pedra Santa offre al cliente camere dallo stile autentico ed accoglienti. Ognuna di essa dispone di aria condizionata e di un balcone con una vista sul mare o sui caratteristici scorci delle rocce granitiche Sarde.  Inoltre le camere dispongono di bagno privato, armadio, cassetta di sicurezza e TV a schermo piatto.
Potrai scegliere tra le nostre camere Junior Suite, Deluxe o Standard a seconda delle tue esigenze.

Gli ospiti del Resort Pedra Santa possono favorire una colazione continentale.

Pedra Santa offers guests cozy and authentically styled rooms. Each room comes with air conditioning and a balcony with a view of either the sea or the characteristic views of the Sardinian granite rocks. Additionally, the rooms have a private bathroom, wardrobe, safe, and flat-screen TV. Guests can choose from our Junior Suite, Deluxe, or Standard rooms based on their needs.

Guests at Pedra Santa Resort can enjoy a continental breakfast.
Title for the previous text
"Authentic and Cozy Accommodations at Pedra Santa Resort"
something else with accomodations?
"Indulge in Comfortable Accommodations and Spectacular Views at Pedra Santa Resort"
5 proposals with accomodations

1. "Unwind in Authentic and Serene Accommodations at Pedra Santa Resort"
2. "Experience Exceptional Comfort and Style in Our Luxurious Pedra Santa Accommodations"
3. "Stay in Style and Comfort at Pedra Santa Resort's Beautifully Appointed Accommodations"
4. "Discover the Best of Coastal Living in our Cozy and Inviting Accommodations at Pedra Santa Resort"
5. "A Room with a View: Enjoy Breathtaking Surroundings and Comfortable Accommodations at Pedra Santa Resort".

Pedra Santa offers guests cozy and authentically styled rooms. Each room comes with air conditioning and a balcony with a view of either the sea or the characteristic views of the Sardinian granite rocks. Additionally, the rooms have a private bathroom, wardrobe, safe, and flat-screen TV. Guests can choose from our Junior Suite, Deluxe, or Standard rooms based on their needs.

Guests at Pedra Santa Resort can enjoy a continental breakfast.
This is a repeat of the previous text.

Oltre al servizio di caffetteria diurno, ogni sera i nostri clienti potranno godersi un meraviglioso aperitivo sulle nostre terrazze panoramiche presso il Bar Luce. Musica soft, vini selezionati, piacevoli drink preparati da esperti barman e la magia del tramonto saranno una garanzia.

Sulle nostre terrazze sarà a disposizione il servizio di ristorazione con piatti proposti dal nostro chef. Verrà offerto un light menù con piatti caldi e freddi di alta qualità per valorizzare i prodotti tipici locali

In addition to daytime coffee service, our guests can enjoy a wonderful evening aperitif on our panoramic terraces at Bar Luce. Soft music, selected wines, delicious drinks prepared by expert bartenders, and the magic of the sunset will guarantee a memorable experience.

Our terraces offer a restaurant service with dishes proposed by our chef. We offer a light menu with high-quality hot and cold dishes that showcase local typical products.
5 title proposals for this text

1. "Indulge in a Sunset Aperitif with Breathtaking Views at Bar Luce"
2. "Unwind with a Selection of Wine and Cocktails at Pedra Santa's Bar Luce"
3. "Experience Memorable Evenings at Pedra Santa's Panoramic Terrace Bar"
4. "Enjoy a Luxurious Dining Experience with Local Dishes at Pedra Santa's Restaurant Terrace"
5. "Savor the Flavors of Sardinia with High-Quality Dishes at Pedra Santa's Beautiful Terrace Restaurant"
La spiaggia è raggiungibile in 4 minuti tramite il nostro servizio di navetta gratuito, lettini ed ombrelloni sono disponibili a pagamento e su prenotazione.
The beach is accessible in 4 minutes via our free shuttle service, and sun loungers and umbrellas are available for a fee and upon reservation.
The beach is accessible in 4 minutes via our free shuttle service, and sun loungers and umbrellas are available for a fee and upon reservation.
This is a repeat of the previous text.
Il Resort Pedra Santa offre una piscina stagionale all’aperto attrezzata con lettini ed ombrelloni e a disposizione di tutti i nostri clienti.
Pedra Santa Resort offers a seasonal outdoor swimming pool equipped with sun loungers and umbrellas, available to all our guests.
5 titles

1. "Dive into Refreshing Waters at Pedra Santa Resort's Outdoor Pool"
2. "Relax and Unwind by the Pool at Pedra Santa Resort"
3. "Take a Dip in Style with Pedra Santa Resort's Unique Pool Experience"
4. "Experience Luxury Poolside Comfort at Pedra Santa Resort"
5. "A Splash of Paradise: Pedra Santa Resort's Seasonal Outdoor Pool for All Your Needs"
Il Resort Pedra Santa offre un centro fitness al coperto. Previa prenotazione, è disponibile un centro benessere dotato di sauna, bagno turco e centro massaggi.
Pedra Santa Resort offers an indoor fitness center. Upon reservation, a wellness center is available with a sauna, Turkish bath, and massage center.
5 TITLES

1. "Stay in Shape and Find Your Moment of Zen at Pedra Santa Resort's Indoor Fitness and Wellness Center"
2. "Renew Your Mind and Body with Pedra Santa Resort's Spa and Fitness Center"
3. "Find Inner Peace and Physical Fitness at Pedra Santa Resort's Wellness Oasis"
4. "Indulge in Ultimate Relaxation and Fitness at Pedra Santa Resort's Health and Wellness Center"
5. "Achieve Your Fitness Goals and Wellness Dreams at Pedra Santa Resort's Indoor Fitness and Spa Haven"
shorter and more inspiring

1. "Revive and Rejuvenate with Pedra Santa Resort's Fitness and Wellness Center"
2. "Elevate Your Mind and Body at Pedra Santa Resort's Spa and Gym"
3. "Find Inner Harmony at Pedra Santa Resort's Wellness Retreat"
4. "Unleash Your Best Self with Pedra Santa Resort's Health and Wellness Center"
5. "Experience Renewal and Vitality at Pedra Santa Resort's Fitness Haven"

Presso il Resort Pedra Santa è disponibile un servizio di noleggio scooter e auto.

Inoltre, a disposizione del cliente il Resort offre un servizio navetta H24 per raggiungere le principali mete ed attrazioni: aeroporto, club, ristoranti e le spiagge della Costa Smeralda.

I nostri servizi di mobilità richiedono la prenotazione anticipata.

Pedra Santa Resort offers a scooter and car rental service.

Additionally, the resort provides a 24-hour shuttle service to reach the main destinations and attractions: airport, clubs, restaurants, and beaches of the Costa Smeralda.

Our mobility services require advance reservation.
5 very short titles for this text

1. "Explore Sardinia with Pedra Santa Resort's Scooter and Car Rentals"
2. "Get Around in Style with Pedra Santa Resort's Transportation Services"
3. "Experience the Best of Costa Smeralda with Pedra Santa Resort's Shuttle Service"
4. "Travel Hassle-Free with Pedra Santa Resort's 24-Hour Shuttle and Mobility Services"
5. "Enjoy Sardinia at Your Own Pace with Pedra Santa Resort's Rental and Shuttle Options"
very short title (max 5 words) for this text: We offer to all guests a free Wi-Fi to enjoy the highest level of comfort at minimal costs
"Free Wi-Fi for Guests"

Offriamo un’app per gestire senza sforzi il soggiorno presso il Resort Pedra Santa.
Tramite l’app sarà infatti possibile visualizzare le informazioni sul Resort e prenotare tutti i nostri servizi disponibili
"Manage Your Stay with Our App"
translate the text in english
"We offer an app to effortlessly manage your stay at Pedra Santa Resort. Through the app, you can view information about the resort and book all our available services."

can you make this text longer?
We offer to all guests a free Wi-Fi to enjoy the highest level of comfort at minimal costs

At Pedra Santa Resort, we understand the importance of staying connected, whether it's for checking in with loved ones, staying updated on the latest news, or simply browsing the web for leisure. That's why we offer free Wi-Fi to all our guests, ensuring the highest level of comfort at minimal costs. With our fast and reliable internet connection, you can easily stay connected while enjoying the beautiful surroundings of the Costa Smeralda in Sardinia. Whether you're lounging by the pool, relaxing in your room, or exploring nearby attractions, our Wi-Fi will keep you connected at all times. It's just one of the many ways we strive to make your stay as enjoyable and convenient as possible.
artistic title very short for previous text
"Stay Connected for Free"

1. "Surf the Web for Free"
2. "Never Miss a Beat"
3. "Connect with Costa Smeralda"
